description: This file contains asynchronous service functions for managing resident profiles and privacy settings, including creating, updating, deleting, and searching residents in a database using SQLAlchemy with async support.

methods.name: ResidentPrivacySettings ensure_privacy_settings_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, resident_id: uuid.UUID)
methods.description: Ensures that a resident has a privacy settings record; creates one with defaults if none exists.

methods.name: ResidentProfile create_resident_profile_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, payload: ResidentProfileCreate)
methods.description: Creates a new resident profile along with default privacy settings.

methods.name: ResidentProfile update_resident_profile_flow( *, db: AsyncSession, resident_id: uuid.UUID, payload: ResidentProfileUpdate, )
methods.description: Updates an existing resident profile and its privacy settings based on provided payload.

methods.name: None delete_resident_profile_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, resident_id: uuid.UUID)
methods.description: Deletes a resident profile (and cascades privacy settings deletion).

methods.name: tuple[list[ResidentProfile],int] search_directory_flow( *, db: AsyncSession, query: str | None, unit: str | None, limit: int, offset: int, )
methods.description: Performs a filtered and paginated search of residents by name or unit.

ctags.name: create_resident_profile_flow
ctags.pattern: /^async def create_resident_profile_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, payload: ResidentProfileCreate) -> R/

ctags.name: delete_resident_profile_flow
ctags.pattern: /^async def delete_resident_profile_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, resident_id: uuid.UUID) -> None:$/

ctags.name: ensure_privacy_settings_flow
ctags.pattern: /^async def ensure_privacy_settings_flow(*, db: AsyncSession, resident_id: uuid.UUID) -> ResidentP/

ctags.name: search_directory_flow
ctags.signature: ( *, db: AsyncSession, query: str | None, unit: str | None, limit: int, offset: int, )

ctags.name: update_resident_profile_flow
ctags.signature: ( *, db: AsyncSession, resident_id: uuid.UUID, payload: ResidentProfileUpdate, )
